Class Chunk

java.lang.Object
cz.cvut.fel.pjv.chunks.Chunk
All Implemented Interfaces:
Serializable
public class Chunk extends Object implements Serializable
The Chunk class is used to store info about chunk.

It is responsible for storing blocks, entities, doors, and spawn positions. The class handles reading chunk data from resources or external files.

See Also:

  • Constructor Details

    • Chunk

      public Chunk(String chunkName, int id, int x, int y, boolean generate)
      Constructs a new chunk instance using the provided parameters.
      Parameters:
      chunkName - the base name for the chunk file.
      id - the unique identifier for the chunk.
      x - the x-coordinate location for the chunk on the grid.
      y - the y-coordinate location for the chunk on the grid.
      generate - flag indicating whether entities should be generated while loading.
